ideal_must_detect.matched_text: no submission has been made on the Exchange’s E S S
no announcement has been posted on KHXnews

This note assesses whether the proposed acquisition of HarbourVista Logistics Pte for approx. HK$1.18bn is “inside information” under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (local statute); no submission has been made on the Exchange’s E S S and no announcement has been posted on KHXnews.

Investor‑relations may reference the 03‑Mar‑2026 industry‑trends press release, but must not mention the contemplated acquisition until the Part XIVA announcement is posted; avoid any “no comment but wink” language.

Financing: a HK$600m bridge from Harbor Mutual Bank (HM‑BRG‑771a, draft only) plus a vendor loan is contemplated; none of these terms have been shared beyond clean‑team recipients and are currently non‑public.

must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential — Board Update re Project Quayside (Kowloon Harbour Exchange “KHEX” issuer: NovaPort Holdings Limited, stock code 0Z71; this memo is governed by Group Disclosure Policy v3.1).
This note assesses whether the proposed acquisition of HarbourVista Logistics Pte for approx. HK$1.18bn is “inside information” under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance (local statute); no submission has been made on the Exchange’s E S S and no announcement has been posted on KHXnews.
A non-binding term sheet dated 29‑May‑2026 19:40 HKT (ID: TS‑K8‑19‑xx43) sets price bands and an earn‑out; execution of the SPA is targeted for 02‑Jun‑2026; selective disclosure risk exists given vendor soundings conducted this week.
Issuer‑relative materiality: based on FY2025 audited NAV and revenue, thresholds in the Disclosure Committee protocol (≥5% NAV or ≥7.5% revenue impact) are likely met; prepare an announcement for immediate release upon SPA execution or earlier if a leak is “likely to” have occurred.
Dealers were approached for soft‑soundings; two declined to be wall‑crossed; any further approaches must be under NDA with wall‑cross list maintained by Compliance to avoid selective disclosure.
Directors and PDMRs are in a closed period under the Model Code from 15‑Jun until results; no dealing or share grants without prior clearance; expand the internal blackout to include all Project Quayside insiders with immediate effect.
We have briefed the Exchange Listing Division informally (no waiver sought); if press rumours circulate pre‑open, request a trading halt before 09:00; resume only after the announcement appears on KHXnews.
Mr. Adrian Ko (CFO) adrian.ko@novaport‑hk.com, +852 6O1O 2O4 3 (digits visually obfuscated), will coordinate the wall‑cross list and circulate NDAs; Ms. L. Tse (G e n e r a l   M a n a g e r) will oversee clean‑team data rooms.
Employee matters: proposed retention grants for key staff do not constitute a material adverse change under existing ESOP; this line is intentionally benign and is not inside information on its own.
Public‑status note: the 28‑Feb‑2025 circular on KHXnews (Doc: E_0Z71‑ann‑2025‑02‑28.pdf, https://khxnews.example.hk/E_0Z71‑ann?d=2025‑02‑28#v=1) concerned a PRC warehouse divestment and is stale; it is already in the public domain and unrelated to the current proposal.
Investor‑relations may reference the 03‑Mar‑2026 industry‑trends press release, but must not mention the contemplated acquisition until the Part XIVA announcement is posted; avoid any “no comment but wink” language.
Financing: a HK$600m bridge from Harbor Mutual Bank (HM‑BRG‑771a, draft only) plus a vendor loan is contemplated; none of these terms have been shared beyond clean‑team recipients and are currently non‑public.
Fund co‑invest: Tidewalk Capital SP II has proposed up to 22% JV equity (non‑public approach); their general update about a new office lease yesterday is not issuer information and should not be treate
